name: indie-founder-mcp
description: Aggregates Lemon Squeezy + Gumroad + Polar + Stripe revenue into one Claude-queryable view.
long_description: Indie Founder Revenue MCP gives Claude a single tool surface across Lemon Squeezy + Gumroad + Polar + Stripe. v0.2 ships all four adapters (LS + Gumroad live-validated against production; Polar + Stripe offline-validated). Free tools: summary_mrr, recent_orders, health. Paid tools (require a Lemon Squeezy license key): top_customers, refund_signal, export_csv_for_tax (NBU-rate-anchored, for Ukrainian FOP 3rd-group filing). Paid tier: $19/mo or $190/yr at https://charliemorrison.lemonsqueezy.com.

tools.name: summary_mrr
tools.description: Combined MRR/ARR across every connected store. Free tier.

tools.name: recent_orders
tools.description: Last N orders across all stores. Free tier.

tools.name: top_customers
tools.description: Highest-revenue customers in window. Paid tier.

tools.name: refund_signal
tools.description: Compares current N-day refund ratio to prior N-day window. Paid tier.

tools.name: export_csv_for_tax
tools.description: CSV export for Ukrainian FOP 3rd-group quarterly filing. Paid tier.

ls_store_id.title: Lemon Squeezy Store ID (optional)
ls_store_id.description: Optional. Without it, the adapter pulls from every store on the account.

polar_org_id.title: Polar Organization ID (optional)
polar_org_id.description: Optional filter. Required only if the token spans multiple orgs.

license_key.title: Indie Founder MCP License Key (paid tier)
license_key.description: Lemon Squeezy license key. Unlocks top_customers, refund_signal, and export_csv_for_tax. Free tools (summary_mrr, recent_orders, health) work without it. Buy at https://charliemorrison.lemonsqueezy.com — $19/mo or $190/yr.
